perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long black hair wearing a patterned tube top and black shorts stands in a hallway looking at the camera with an annoyed expression. (2) She uses a card key to open a dark door and enters a bedroom. (3) She approaches a woman sleeping on a bed and shakes her to wake her up. The sleeping woman, wearing a black top, wakes up and holds her phone. (4) The first woman sits on the bed next to her, looking happy and talking excitedly with hand gestures. (5) The video cuts to graphics showing a mobile game interface, promotional banners, and registration steps. (6) The woman continues to speak directly to the camera with various promotional text overlays appearing around her.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts. A female voice speaks in Mandarin with a clear, slightly annoyed tone. (2) Sound of a door latch clicking open. (3) Two female voices engage in a dialogue; one is high-pitched and energetic, the other sounds groggy and low-pitched. (4) The music continues at a steady volume while the main female speaker transitions into a persuasive, high-energy sales pitch. (5) Short sound effects like 'ding' and 'pop' occur as visual text elements appear. (6) Music fades slightly as the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 當你在睡覺被突擊... (When you are raided while sleeping...) - Hook text. (2) 今天跟元元約好要吃早餐 (Today I made an appointment with Yuan Yuan for breakfast) - Functional narration. (3) 妳手機是不是壞了啊？ (Is your phone broken?) - Dialogue. (4) 可以換 iPhone 17 了 (Can change to iPhone 17 now) - Promotional hook. (5) 天天抽 iPhone 的活動 (Daily iPhone draw activity) - Promotional information. (6) 持續一個月 (Lasts for one month) - Functional text. (7) 大明星親送 (Celebrity personally delivers) - Promotional hook. (8) 立即下載遊戲參加活動 (Download the game immediately to join) - Call to Action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Short skit intro -> Problem identified (broken phone) -> Promotional solution/demo -> Call to action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main creator/narrator and one friend on the bed.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The narrator has long black hair with bangs, wearing a black and white patterned tube top and black shorts with a tattoo on her left arm. The friend has long brown hair and wears a black sports tank top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor bedroom with a grey tufted headboard, white walls, and standard power outlets. The promotional part uses white/neutral backgrounds overlaid with vibrant graphic design elements.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Conflict -> Solution -> Promotion -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video is a direct commercial promotion for the mobile game '金好運' (Jin Hao Yun). It uses a lifestyle skit featuring influencers to create a hook about a friend's broken phone, then seamlessly transitions into promoting a lucky draw event for the iPhone 17. The ultimate goal is to drive app downloads and event participation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct verbal mention of the game, on-screen logo placement, and tutorial on how to register for the brand's event.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced subtitle transitions and variety-show style sound effects.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of '元元' (a known influencer) adds social proof to the advertisement. The video relies on the 'benefit-driven' hook of winning a high-value physical prize (iPhone 17).
